entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere: BW Series – Getting Started (Part 2)
entry.content:
Great but not work for me 

Always an error like this :

The query executed with errors. No values set for mandatory HIDDEN variable. : DEBUT_PERIODE

The prompt give me the correct value YTD, ....

The View VD_XXX_PERIOD_SELECTION with YTD give the correct value for START and END 

But never send the value to input parameter in AM

AM Definition 

DEBUT_PERIODE Standard Variable
Business Name
DEBUT_PERIODE
Data Type
Inherited (String(8))
Value Definition
Derived from "VD_XXX_PERIOD_SELECTION"
Is Mandatory
Yes
Used in (1)
DEBUT_PERIODE (Input Parameter)
 
 
FIN_PERIODE Standard Variable
Business Name
Date de fin de période
Data Type
Inherited (String(8))
Value Definition
Derived from "VD_XXX_PERIOD_SELECTION"
Is Mandatory
Yes
Used in (1)
FIN_PERIODE (Input Parameter)
 
SELECTIONNEZ_LA_PERIODE Standard Variable
Business Name
Sélectionnez la période
Data Type
Inherited (String(5))  
Value Help
PERIODE (VD_XXX_DATE_SELECTION)
Value Definition
Manual
Is Mandatory
Yes
Used in (2)
FIN_PERIODE (Standard Variable)
DEBUT_PERIODE (Standard Variable)

entry.title: Re: Why is Hungarian Notation Harmful?
entry.content:
@rosenpetrov 

Naming is a part of clean code. Not using HN is just one of the naming rules. The other, more important, is to name things by their context. So to answer to your question, I need to add the context, so here's the example:

CLASS lcl_quotation DEFINITION.
PUBLIC SECTION.
METHODS get_ordered_value
  RETURNING(result) TYPE p.

PRIVATE_SECTION.
  DATA: orders TYPE TABLE OF REF TO lcl_order. "table of orders, that derive from this quotation
ENDCLASS.

CLASS lcl_quotation IMPLEMENTATION.
METHOD get_ordered_value.
*let's assume, that initially I made summary, but now I need to deduct
*rejected, or not finished orders (example is created now in hurry, so it
*doesn't necessary make sense)
  data: rejected_orders TYPE TABLE OF REF TO lcl_orders.
  LOOP at orders ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<order>).
    IF <order>->is_completed() = abap_false.
      APPEND <order> TO rejected_orders.
    ENDIF.
  ENDLOOP.
*later I do calculus and differential equations on rejected orders to see, if 
*customer was happy or not ;)
ENDCLASS.

As you can see, my local context is always something. I either look at rejected orders, or completed orders, or blue orders, or green orders. So I name them accordingly. But if I use HN, I will not think about context - I don't have to. Thinking about context costs some effort. So I call it mt_orders and lt_orders. But who knows what is inside lt_orders? You have to read the WHOLE code to figure it out, whereas variable rejected_orders is self-explanatory, self-documenting and self-commenting.

This is exactly what I meant when I wrote that HN impairs the way of thinking.

entry.title: Re: Eclipse - Where-Used functionality for ABAP CDS views...
entry.content: It worked! Thank you so much! 🙂

entry.title: Re: Working with the Attachment plugin - Cloud Application Programming
entry.content: In the npm, none of the version exists - thus, I am not able to deploy the app and make it work using attachment. The document says - To be able to use the Fiori uploadTable feature, you must ensure 1.121.0/ 1.122.0/ ^1.125.0 SAPUI5 version is updated in the application's index.html

entry.title: Re: Extensibility in Sales and Service V2
entry.content:
Can the in app extensibility access data from S4?

I have a scenario, need to extend the V2 screen with a display field (in app extensibility) and the data should fill from S4.

Scenario: By standard V2 displays meter info. We want to enhance one field 'meter type' next to the meter number. the data for meter type is available at S4.

the meter info has standard API from V2. can we enhance it or do we adopt a new API for this one specific field?

How do I extend the data source for in app extensibility?

entry.title: Query Info and BEx Variable selection in SAC Excel Add-In workbook
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am using SAC excel add-in and trying to connect to SAP BEx queries directly using tunnel live connection in SAC. If I look at the SAP functions available, I don't see anything to display following information in the workbook

Also, how does one display prompt (BEx query variable selection) values in SAC to display what user has selected to refresh the tables in the workbook.

Thanks

Regards

Tanisha

entry.title: Re: Accelerated Business Transformation – Moving from SAP ERP 6.0 to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Editio
entry.content:
Wow Marco 👌

 

After doing 3 - S/4 Certifications in 2020 / 21 

i.e S/4 HANA Activate PM, Public Cloud & Private Cloud certifications, I have throughly enjoyed reading your blog. This has just helped me as a refresher as it’s covering all the 3 topics mentioned above .

Going forward SAP shall focus more on educating customers about “SAP offers a full Cloud ERP strategy through two-tier ERP deployment, enabling integration between SAP S/4HANA on-premise and SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition or between SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition and SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition”. Lot of customers are unaware of this , as this is very important as many customers have started their SAP S/4 HANA journey in the past and implemented S/4 partially for few segments and restarting their S/4 journey now ..

This blog shows how much passion you have , keep inspiring us 🤩

entry.title: Re: Flow function: "Set repeated item value" suddenly not working
entry.content:
Hello Dan, sorry for the delay in getting back.

So, I have a LIST of objects in a display whereby the user may expand or hide each object individually (depending on the value of a boolean property "visible_act_details" within each object). 

The LIST of objects (pageVars.PGV_search_act_result) looks like:

[ {"name": "Beatles", "visible_act_details": true }, {"name": "Bugs", "visible_act_details": false } ]

To display or hide a specific object within the LIST, the user clicks a TEXT (located within the repeated display) with a "Component tap" that executes a "Set repeated item value" flow function. The "Set repeated item value" assigns a True or False value to the object's property, "visible_act_details".

The visibility of each specific object has this property's value, "visible_act_details".

As @jpegenau suggested, I tried:

SET_ITEM_AT(pageVars.PGV_search_act_result, repeatedInfo.current.index, SET_KEY(item, "visible_act_details", true)) but still no success.

Hope this clarifies my situation.  If you have access to my app let me know and I will give you the details.

Thanks, Nick

entry.title: Re: Career Guidance!
entry.content: Thank you Macro for your suggestion I will definitely look into it. Please guide me if I happen to come with questions!

entry.title: Pack Outbound Delivery - Fiori
entry.content:
Pack Outbound Delivery

 

  1. Define activity

 

 

 

 

  1. Define work center

 

 

We defined the storage type as 9025 Goods Issue and Packaging because a work center cannot be assigned to storage type 9020, and we assigned the PACK activity to the work center.

 

 

  1. Assigning Activity to Text Identifiers

 

 

 

 

  1. Enabling Asynchronous UI Interaction

T-code: /N/SCWM/PACK_ODLV_ASYNC

 

  1. ODATA SERVICE için Soft State Mode Aktifleştirme

To improve packing performance, you can activate soft state mode for OData service PACK_OUTBDLV_SRV.

Prerequisites Set Service Data

  1. Open the transaction SICF.
  2. Choose the node of your Gateway service e.g. under sap/opu/odata/scwm/pack_outbdlv_srv.
  3. Select the tab Service Data. Make sure that the inactivity session time-out for your service is greater than 00:00:00. However, too large session time-out is not expected. During development and testing, we set this value to 00:00:30.

Activate Soft State Mode

  1. Open the transaction /IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE , The soft state status of the service is displayed with one of the following values: Active, Inactive, Not Supported or empty.
  2. To activate soft state, choose button Soft State button. For more information, see SAP note 1986626.

 

  1. Etiket Ayarları

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Go to the work center and complete the printing determination schema.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

  1. Creating Condition Record for Labels

T-code: /SCWM/PRHU6

 

 

  1. Hasarlı Ürünleri Aktifleştirme

In the Pack Outbound Delivery application, you can see a button that reports damaged products during packing. To activate this, the storage type customization should be as follows.

 

 

  1. Connecting the Scale to the Weighing Device

We can connect the scale to the weighing device to weigh handling units. In this context, we will follow three steps between the work center and the scale.

  1. Define the RFC Destination for the Scale

 

 

Define scale

 

 

 

 

 

 

  1. Assigning the storage bins for the Work Center

T-code: /SCWM/TWSPACKMAT

 

 

  1. Customizing Access Codes
    The purpose of this customization is to perform certain tasks more quickly using shortcut buttons.

Tasks:
• Create a HU (Handling Unit)
• Delete a HU
• Pack Only One Item
• Pack All Items

 

 

 

 

 

 

  1. Selecting Favorite Packaging Materials
    With this customization, the most frequently used packaging materials can be displayed as buttons on the screen, allowing warehouse staff to select the desired packaging materials more quickly

 

Define Favorite Packaging Materials under SCM Extended Warehouse Management -> Extended Warehouse Management -> Master Data -> Work Center

 

 

 

 

  • Test Scenario

 

Firstly do picking process

 

 

 

 

 

Go to fiori screen “packaging delivery”

 

 

There are two different packing modes:

  1. Advanced
  2. Basic

We will proceed with the example using the advanced packing mode.

 

 

 

 

Enter the delivery in the reference number field and press the Enter button. The packaging material creation screen will appear. Here, you can select a favorite packaging material or choose other packaging materials.

 

 

Select the material and click the Pack button.

 

 

 

 

 

The gross weight can be entered. By clicking the settings icon, more details about the material can be displayed.

Click the Close button to complete the packing process.

entry.title: Re: Sap B1 Hana Installation
entry.content: Hi, the SAP HANA database and the SAP Business One backend services, such as SLD, license server, Web client etc. need to be installed in Suse Linux Enterprise Server 15. The desktop client will be installed in MS Windows.

entry.title: Close a angular popup from a SAPUI5 button
entry.content:
Dear Techies,

Need a help to find a solution for the below issue:

  1. Parent app Angular app. 
  2. A view with save/cancel button in it  is developed in SAPUI5.
  3. View is embedded in a Angular popup.
  4. With save/cancel I want to close this popup

Need to help in achieving this eventing, any help is highly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: SAP view ”I_ProjectDemand" add field
entry.content: adding tag SAP S/4HANA Cloud for enterprise portfolio and project management as CDS view belongs to this LOB Area

entry.title: Re: How to Utilize an OData Service in Public cloud
entry.content:
Hello Gahan_Narayan

 

The ODATA Service LO_VCHCLF_SIMULATION_SRV is called internally when the app Simulate Configuration Models (F2570) is opened on the Fiori Launchpad . Unfortunately it is not possible to call this externally / directly in S/4HANA Cloud as its not released as an API 

 

The Released APIs for Integrated Product Development for Discrete Industries ( Which includes VCH )

is available at this resource

 

If you would like the ODATA service released as an API then please raise a feature request by following the

KBA 2963059 ( https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/2963059 )

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Form data option not working in SAP CPI but working in POSTMAN - 404 Error
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have created a flow to extract the base 64 encoded file from a field called <FileContent> and decoded the same and send to JIRA in form-data format. I have added the relevent details in the header but it is failing by 404 error in SAP CPI.

Tried taking help from the below mentioned blog, but still it is not working.

Strange is that when I am sending the same file(decoded one as well) from POSTMAN it is working and delivering fine but through SAP CPI it is failing with below error.

Error Details
org.apache.camel.component.ahc.AhcOperationFailedException: HTTP operation failed invoking https://bseXXXtlassian.net/rest/api/3/issue/78053/attachments with statusCode: 404
 
Please suggest, if I am missing any configuration here?
Thanks,
Nidhi Srivastava

entry.title: Re: How to Handle Mass Role "assign site" in workzone
entry.content: Yes, we are already using that feature. Even though no role is created in Cloud Foundry, we still need to "assign site."

entry.title: Recap of SAP Inside Track Auckland 2024 Q4: A Grand Finale
entry.content:
As the year draws to a close, we had the pleasure of hosting our final SAP Inside Track event for 2024 in Auckland, New Zealand. The event, held on December 4th at the SAP Building in Auckland, was an incredible success. We owe a huge thank you to all participants who joined us for this memorable occasion.

Highlights of the Event include:

Session 1: S/4HANA RISE at WEL Networks - A Partner-Led Brownfield Transformation

We kicked off the event with an inspiring session by Chris Puddle, SAP Product Owner from WEL Networks and Paul Brown, Solution Architect at Deloitte. They shared their groundbreaking transformation from SAP ECC to RISE with SAP S/4HANA, the first partner-led brownfield migration in New Zealand. This transformation was completed in just five months, highlighting the power of collaboration among WEL Network, Deloitte, and SAP. Key takeaways included:

  • Navigating the complexities of a brownfield transformation.
  • Insights and strategies that ensured the project’s success.
  • Tips to help attendees prepare for their own S/4HANA transformations.

Session 2: Unlocking the Full Potential of Your GROW Entitlements

The second session, presented by Grace Melhuish, Enterprise Customer Success Partner at SAP, was equally impactful. Grace delved into how to maximize the benefits of GROW with SAP entitlements, emphasizing often-overlooked resources like Continuous Quality Checks and Cloud ALM. She provided valuable strategies to leverage these tools for ensuring optimal system performance and long-term success in the cloud.

Continuing the Journey in 2025

As we wrapped up the event, the energy and excitement for what lies ahead were palpable. The insights shared will undoubtedly help attendees as they plan for a successful 2025. We’re thrilled to continue building and expanding the SAP community in Auckland.

Join the SAP Community

If you’re passionate about SAP and looking to share your experiences and knowledge, we invite you to join the Auckland SAP Community. It’s a fantastic platform to connect with like-minded professionals and stay updated on the latest SAP innovations and events.

Join Auckland SAP Community

Spread the Word!

We encourage you to share your experiences and help spread the word about our SAP Inside Track events. Here’s to closing 2024 with a bang and stepping into a new year full of opportunities and growth.

Thank you once again to everyone who attended and contributed to the event’s success. We look forward to seeing you in 2025!

entry.title: Re: Tips and Tricks Best Practice: Annual Leave Accrual Recalculation based on different leave limit
entry.content:
Hello.

I would like to ask, if this way, the system will automatically recalculate the accrual for the current year. Thanks

entry.title: Re: Second Half 2024 Release: What's New in SAP SuccessFactors Time Management
entry.content: Hello. I would like to ask, how does the connection with Teams ? Do I need a separate license? How do you connect Time to Teams? Thanks

entry.title: Re: Test Cases of Descoped Solution Processes in Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hello Sharath,

currently there is no indication of such test cases in Test Preparation app, however when you open the linked the process from the test case, you see whether it is scoped or not.

I would suggest using a tag in test cases, e.g 'Descoped', which can substitute additional status and help you to filter and find such test cases better.

Apart from that please take a look to the following roadmap item for SAP Cloud ALM - https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?PRODUCT=73554900100800002513&range=CURRENT-LAST#;INNO=F990450159E01EEDA3A103056629D687
It might be helpful to change the process in the test case in the future (as an example from descoped to a new one scoped and adjust). 

Kind regards,
Mariia

entry.title: MD67 Split number of weeks
entry.content:
Dear SAP experts,

I have an issue with automatic split of PIRs. i have maintained settings below and expect that after MD67 run I'll have first 7 months split into weekly requirements and first 8 weeks split into daily requirement.

 

But after MD67 run (on December 2nd 2024) this is what i get. Look like 8 weeks were split as expected, but then monthly split stopped in April way earlier than it should.

Am i misunderstanding how MD67 works?

entry.title: Re: D3js google charts not rendering
entry.content:
No its still not showing any graphs, see example below

New is showing how the graphs are not rendering, while the previous versions did work on the same data set (old).

 

New.                                               Old 

 

Also using the new way of the graph query:

function chartExecutor(chartData) { // Now accepts chartData as a parameter
// Load any necessary Google Charts libraries
google.charts.load('current', {'packages':['corechart']});
google.charts.setOnLoadCallback(drawChart);

// Define the chart drawing function
function drawChart() {
// Convert the provided chartData to a DataTable
const data = google.visualization.arrayToDataTable(chartData);

const options = {
chartArea: { width: '80%'},
height: 310,
legend: { position: 'right' }, // Positioning legend to the right
backgroundColor: '#ffffff',
pieHole: 0.3, // Configuring for a donut chart appearance
colors: ['#4acc0e', '#7FFF00', '#40E0D0', '#1E90FF', '#2fc4ff'], // Colors varying from yellow-green to blue
animation:{
duration: 250,
easing: 'out',
startup: true
},
// The vAxes and hAxes options are not applicable to PieCharts and can be removed
bar: { groupWidth: "40%" } // This option is also not applicable to PieCharts
};

// The element ID where the chart will be drawn is 'chart_data_div'
const chart = new google.visualization.PieChart(document.getElementById('chart_data_div'));
chart.draw(data, options);
}
}

// Convert the modified chart function to a string for consumption
const funcAsString = chartExecutor.toString();

return { funcAsString };

entry.title: Re: Flow function: "Set repeated item value" suddenly not working
entry.content:
1) When the user clicks the text, then the item disappears? Can a user make it come back? Can you provide some screenshots?

2) The formula above sets the visibility to true, no? Don't you want to set to false?

3) Did you send me somehow your project? Your last reply suggests I have access to it.

entry.title: Re: Structure list for equipment in PM Order with several...
entry.content:
Hi Jurgen,
No what you are getting is as per standard SAP. Equipment in operation has different purpose like inspection round. But work order will be always associated with one equipment and that is at header and list will come up for that one only.

Regards,

entry.title: How to auto trigger price update when important data is changed in sales order?
entry.content:
Hello,

prices (e.g. PPR0) depends on several fields, which can be changed later. For example, Plant.

When user changes the Plant (or other data), we need to automatically trigger full prices update, otherwise all pricing conditions stay unchanged and user must always trigger price update which may lead to errors.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to auto trigger price update when important data...
entry.content: Pricing does not call itself, so this cannot be done via pricing. Usually this is done by calling the application, which in this case is Sales Orders.

entry.title: Re: Clarification about BS22 Changes for System Status in...
entry.content:
Hi,

I would suggest follow below link

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/risks-consequences-associated-with-making-changes-in-bs22/qaq-p/6462833

Also, just fyi. In one of my implementation I have done changes in BS22 and later raised of the issue and got support by sap.

entry.title: Re: SAP DM 2200 - ESEF - validation message
entry.content: Hi @dorotazukowska , based on the issues mentioned, it seems report tagging and package creation didn't work at all, please make sure you performed all steps required for XBRL report creation.

entry.title: Building a RAP Application: From Custom Actions to Sending Emails – A Step-by-Step Guide
entry.content:
If you've started exploring SAP RAP, you may have noticed that classes like CL_BCS, which are typically used for sending emails in SAP, cannot be directly used in RAP. The main reason is that RAP does not allow the use of "COMMIT" which is required by these classes.

In this blog, I aim to address this limitation while also exploring how to create a custom action and build a simple RAP project.

The blog will be structured around the following key topics:

  1. Creation of Interface and Consumption CDS Views
  2. Creation of Metadata
  3. Creation of the Service
  4. Creation of Behavior
  5. Creation of Class and Action
  6. Email Sending Process

To ensure clarity, we will proceed with an example scenario throughout the blog. Our scenario involves listing invoices and some details from the VBAK table, and sending the selected data via email as part of the email sending process.

Creation of Interface and Consumption CDS Views

Interface CDS is used to abstract raw data into a reusable and meaningful structure, serving as the foundational data model. Consumption CDS, on the other hand, processes this data to make it user-friendly and tailored for specific use cases, such as reporting, Fiori UI, or analytical solutions.

Even though we might not need it for this project, it is generally good practice to follow this structure. Let's start by creating the Interface CDS view.

For the sake of example, I have added a few fields. You can expand it according to your scenario. Additionally, ensure that the entity is marked as "root," as this will be our top-level entity. [Figure-1]

Figure-1

 During the creation of the Consumption CDS, we used the "Audat" filter to narrow down our dataset and also to leverage the Consumption logic. [Figure-2]

Figure-2

Creation of Metadata

In SAP RAP (Restful ABAP Programming Model), metadata extensions are used to enhance the metadata of existing CDS views or entities without modifying the original CDS definition. This is especially useful for tailoring application behavior or UI representations in a decoupled and non-intrusive manner.

We create metadata from our Consumption CDS.[Figure-3]

Figure-3

After creating the metadata extensions, we add annotations.[Figure-4] 

Figure-4

Creation of the Service

Now, we create a service definition from our Consumption CDS.
You can follow Figures 5 and 6 for reference.

Figure-5

Figure-6

After the service is created, we must not forget to expose our Consumption CDS views.[Figure-7]

Figure-7

Now, we need to create a service binding. For this, we will use the service definition we previously created.[Figure-8]

Figure-8

Make sure to select "OData V2 - UI" as the Binding Type.
When the service is first created, it will not be published. To publish it, click the button I have highlighted.[Figure-9]

Figure-9

In the published service, you can view the entity sets and associations that you have added.[Figure-10]

Figure-10


If you want to test the service, simply double-click on the entity. This allows you to test your service easily.[Figure-11]

Figure-11

Creation of Behavior

Behavior definitions for the business object entities in a given composition model are established for the root CDS view, outlining the behavior for all included entities.

Therefore, we create Behavior definitions for both the Interface and Consumption CDS views.

Let's start with the Interface CDS.[Figure-12]

Figure-12

After creating the Behavior, we add an alias.
Since we will not perform create, update, or delete operations, we can disable these actions. [Figure-13]

The class "zbp_i_vbak_example" will be created in later steps.

 

Figure-13

 

Now, we need to create a Behavior for our Consumption CDS.[Figure-14 & 15]

Figure-14

Figure-15

We have successfully created the Behavior within the Consumption CDS. Now, we can move on to the next step.

Creation of Class and Action

To make the action we are going to create functional, we need a class.
To create the class, go to the Behavior, right-click, and select "Quick Fix".[Figure-16]

Figure-16

Here, we select "Create" to create our class.[Figure-17]

Figure-17

 


The class creation process is now complete.
Make sure to note that all the code we have written is under "Local Types".[Figure-18]

 

Figure-18

To create an action, we first need an abstract CDS. This CDS will define the input parameters for the action.
For this, we create a new Data Definition.
 Here, we will define the input parameter for the email address.[Figure-19]

Figure-19

Next, we go to the Interface ZI_** named behavior and define our action. We will provide the Abstract CDS as the parameter. [Figure-20]

Figure-20

Then, by clicking the Quick Fix button, we ensure the class method for the action is defined.[Figure-21]

Figure-21

Next, we go to the ZC_*-named behavior and define the action there as well.[Figure-22]

Figure-22

Finally, to make the button visible on the screen, we go to the Metadata Extension and add the relevant line.[Figure-23]

 

Figure-23

 

 

 

 

: { lineItem: [ 
      { type: #FOR_ACTION, dataAction: 'SendMail', label: 'Send Mail' } ]}

 

 

 

 

Once we execute the service again, you will be able to see the button added.[Figure-24]

 

Figure-24

Email Sending Process

As we mentioned earlier, we cannot use classes like CL_BCS that include a "commit" in RAP for email sending. Therefore, we will use the CL_BCS_MAIL_MESSAGE class to send emails.

For this, we go to the class where we defined the Send_mail method.
The selected row and email information will be contained in the "keys" variable. We will read the table and send the email. I have not included many details in the email content, but you can add more as needed.[Figure-25]

Figure-25

 

 

 

 

 METHOD SendMail.
    DATA:lv_mail TYPE bcs_msg_sender.
    DATA(ls_keys) = VALUE #( keys[ 1 ] OPTIONAL ).
    lv_mail = ls_keys-%param-Mail.
    DATA(mail) = cl_bcs_mail_message=>create_instance( ).
    mail->set_sender( 'Sender@mail.com' ).
    mail->add_recipient( lv_mail ).


    mail->set_subject( 'Test' ).

    mail->set_main( cl_bcs_mail_textpart=>create_instance(
        iv_content      = '<h2>Hi</h2><p>Hi you can see the details of invoice number ' && ls_keys-Vbeln &&' below. </p>'
        iv_content_type = 'text/html' ) ).

    mail->send( IMPORTING et_status = DATA(lt_status) ).

  ENDMETHOD.

 

 

 

 

 

Now, we run a preview of the service. We select an invoice, click the Send Mail button, and enter the email address.[Figure-26]

Figure-26

To check the email, we will use the "SOST" transaction code.
As shown in the figure, the email has been successfully sent.[Figure-27]

Figure-27

I hope it has been a useful blog.
Regards.

entry.title: Re: Form data option not working in SAP CPI but working in POSTMAN - 404 Error
entry.content: Hello Nidhi, do you use OAuth 2.0 authorization in CPI or basic auth?

entry.title: Re: How to setup BTP Destination with Document Translation API at SAP Translation Hub
entry.content: I searched more about that, some document says OAuth 2.0 Application Flow is same as OAuth2ClientCredentials option. OAuth 2.0 Application Flow is also called Client Credentials Grant. And the technical implementation of Client Credentials Grant in the OAuth 2.0 standard is called OAuth2ClientCredentials. Is this information correct?

entry.title: Re: Why is Hungarian Notation Harmful?
entry.content: @Michał_B word of the day is "context" and good naming provides all the context one needs for solid understanding... great example BTW!

entry.title: Re: How can I maintain decimals in calculating Frequency in days under posting parameters in RE-FX?
entry.content: Hi can you clarify with an example what you are looking for? The days are not calculated in decimal places but the conditions are calculated up to 6 decimal places. Please describe the business scenario.

Do you know what steps you need to take to resolve the issue?

Do you know what steps you need to take to resolve the issue?

entry.title: SAP Fiori Overview Page: 2 lines in 1 chart
entry.content:
Hello community, 

after many hours of try and fail, asking the community experts here.

I'm trying to create an SAP Fiori Elements - Overview Page.

In the backend I've written the RAP Odata V2 service (almost no CDS annotations as I mainly use XML annotations via Guided Implementation wizard).

The CDS structure is following (synthetic example):

Date (abap.dats)Price_Germany (int4)Price_USA (int4)
01 December 2024100200
02 December 2024101202
03 December 2024105210

In the Overview Page I've created several cards, including the Line Chart. All good.

The line is displayed properly for Price_Germany.

Now I would like to add another line to the same Line Chart, so I have Price_USA displayed.

Can you please let me know how this can be achieved?

I tried following:

 

<Annotation Term="UI.Chart" Qualifier="ChartQualifier_Prices">
                    <Record Type="UI.ChartDefinitionType">
                        <PropertyValue Property="ChartType" EnumMember="UI.ChartType/Line" />
                        <PropertyValue Property="Title" String="Price Germany vs USA" />
                        <PropertyValue Property="Dimensions">
                            <Collection>
                                <PropertyPath>Date</PropertyPath>
                            </Collection>
                        </PropertyValue>
                        <PropertyValue Property="DimensionAttributes">
                            <Collection>
                                <Record Type="UI.ChartDimensionAttributeType">
                                    <PropertyValue Property="Dimension" PropertyPath="Date" />
                                    <PropertyValue Property="Role" EnumMember="UI.ChartDimensionRoleType/Category" />
                                </Record>
                            </Collection>
                        </PropertyValue>
                        <PropertyValue Property="Measures">
                            <Collection>
                                <PropertyPath>Price_Germany</PropertyPath>
<PropertyPath>Price_USA</PropertyPath>
                            </Collection>
                        </PropertyValue>
                        <PropertyValue Property="MeasureAttributes">
                            <Collection>
                                <Record>
                                    <PropertyValue Property="Measure" PropertyPath="Price_Germany"/>
                                    <PropertyValue Property="Role" EnumMember="UI.ChartMeasureRoleType/Axis1" />
                                </Record>
                                <Record>
                                    <PropertyValue Property="Measure" PropertyPath="Price_USA"/>
                                    <PropertyValue Property="Role" EnumMember="UI.ChartMeasureRoleType/Axis1" />
                                </Record>
                            </Collection>
                        </PropertyValue>
                    </Record>
                </Annotation>

 

But it is throwing be the error 50017 - incorrect Binding 

Feels like I'm somewhere very close, but can't find a solution and it is frustrating 🙂

Please kindly advise.

entry.title: Re: Fiori Elements OVP - Two series or measures in analytical card
entry.content: Hi Mio, were you able to solve this? I'm facin the same issue and stuck.

entry.title: Re: Development Experience Sharing for SAC Widget Add-on
entry.content:
Hi @shruti_srivastava3,

Custom Widget Add-ons currently don't support Table Widget and only support limited Chart Widget: bar/column, stacked bar/column...(refer here). If you want to have Custom Add-ons for Table Widget, you can submit the improvement request on SAP Influence. 

Hope it helps.

BR, Sharon

entry.title: Re: Deploying Features based on User Stories in Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hi Sharath,

As answered above, you can track it via Feature Traceability. 

More info could be found below:

Learning Journey: Using Integrated Analytics for Project Tracking and Traceability

Help Document: https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-alm/applicationhelp/feature-traceability

Br, Williams

entry.title: Re: Story/report to show all members of a Public Dimension
entry.content: You can put this dimension into row axis and select property you need from table builder panel, switch show unbook on and finally hide the measure column.

entry.title: Re: Tips and Tricks Best Practice: Annual Leave Accrual Recalculation based on different leave limit
entry.content: @Bernardo_Santos - Yes recalculations of accruals takes place automatically as long as settings are maintained. Like absence change in TAT and Accrual calculation relevance in time type

entry.title: Re: How to get response of backend with Offline OData Upload
entry.content: @SW10 Error archive will list only the rejected requests from the backend.

entry.title: Re: Crystal report upgrade
entry.content:
Hi Don, our environment is isolated from the internet, are the 64bit 2020 CR license's offline versions?

Also, will we require a license server? We currently using CR 2008.

entry.title: DRP Node Type Config
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Need your help to find out the path to make the changes in the config of DRP Node Type. I have checked the Production node in IMG but not found any node for DRP Node types. As per the table MDRP_NODT currently we have below Node Types available.

A - Store
B - Distribution center
CD - Customer warehouse
DC - Distribution center
EW - Central warehouse
PD - Production/Storage
PL - Production plant
TS - Stock transfer point

As there are two Node Types available for Distribution Center i.e. 'B' & 'DC', so user has requested to change the description for Node Type 'B' to as other. Pls let me know the impact of this change and the way to change it.

entry.title: Re: Multiple selection ListPicker can anyone give me a hint?
entry.content: @NoGu You have posted a similar question here https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/multiple-selection-in-listpicker-could-someone-help-me/qaq-p/13954440 . There are already some exchange, please continue over there for this query.

entry.title: Re: App Manage Bank Accounts (F1366A) – Error in create p...
entry.content:
@Leti 

The payment approval function is available only with the advanced cash management scope, which means you'd need to acquire the additional license 8011042 (SAP S/4HANA Cloud for cash management) for using the function. 

You need to activate the scope item Advanced Bank Account Management (J77) to use the configuration activity Define Settings for Bank Account Master Data.

entry.title: Re: Account balance filter is not saved
entry.content:
Hi,

Can you check by entering a required Account Balance filter and then click on 'OK' instead of back arrow or Cancel button when trying to close or move out of the Account Balance window?

Re-login to the database and open the Account Balance window again and check if the filter is changed or remain as last run.

Regards,

Jitin

entry.title: Removing dependancy on npmrc file
entry.content:
Dear  Experts

We recently moved to SAP Hybris CCV2 cloud  and faced issue in the build after 2 months. The solution was ,there key of the npmrc  has to be changed and it need to be change every six months.

As we are not using any customization there, can we remove this file and dependancy?

Please suggest.

Also if possible,let us know what all files need to be removed.

The changes are needed only on our source code or any changes neede on environment front to..

entry.title: Re: Dimension Description Text Options
entry.content: You can create a propperty as alternative description, and then in your story table, you can show this description as a separate column next to your dimension ID.

Regards ,

SAI K

entry.title: Withholding tax percentage to change if the invoice amount crosses Rs.5 crores
entry.content:
Dear estemeed members,

A requirement of my client is that if the invoice amount crosses Rs.50,000,000, the withholding tax should be calculated at 2%. If the amount is less than Rs.50,000,000, then the withholding tax should be calculated @ 0.25%. Currently, the system is capturing only @ 0.25% irrespective of the threshhold limit of Rs.50,000,000.

I have tried maintaining an exmption amount of Rs.50,000,000 and percentage in the vendor master. It is not working. Or maybe I am doing it wrong. Please find attached the screenshot. I4 tax code is configured at 2%. I4 should capture 0.25% if amount is below Rs.50,000,000. Currently it is capturing @0.25%.

How can this be achieved using a single tax code? Please advise and guide with the steps. Greatly appreciate all the help!

entry.title: Diff_analyzer not posting
entry.content:
Hello Guru, 

Kindly help me with a situation have long been stuck, I have created a diff_Analzer document on July 07th 2024 and counted on the same day, I am trying to post the documents now, it is not allowing to post, showing the batch is associated with the product and cannot be posted. We have a separate bin created for the difference in the quantities are posted from that bin.

Regards,

Venkat.

entry.title: Re: MD04 date calculation
entry.content: Hi All, Please advise on MD04 requirement. Regards, Venkat

entry.title: Re: Automatic Forecast on Tables
entry.content: Every 5 historic period can predict one future period, looks like you don't have enough histroic data to predict more.

entry.title: Create your first CAP plugin
entry.content:
Why?

A CAP plugin allows you to extend the framework with your own features without touching the core framework. This offers the great possibility to create something generic and share it with the community so other developers can benefit from it.

SAP already provides several plugins listed here: https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/plugins/

But also the SAP community is creating and sharing plugins which you can find on npm: https://www.npmjs.com/search?q=cap%20plugin and on Best of CAP: https://bestofcapjs.org/

 

How?

It is super easy to create your own CAP plugin. Just follow these steps:

  • Create a new folder for the plugin:

  • Go in the folder and open cmd
  • Run the command “npm init”
    • Fill in all questions similar to I did below:

  • Add dev dependencies:
    • npm i -D @sap/cds
  • Add peer dependencies for CAP:

 

"peerDependencies": {
    "@sap/cds": ">=8"
  },

 

  • Add a cds-plugin.js file to the root of your plugin.
    • This will be automatically loaded when a CAP project has the plugin as an npm dependency
    • This is the place where you can implement the logic for your plugin, similar as you do in a custom server.js implementation.
    • I also came across some errors when testing my plugins locally. To be able to solve this, I use the following way of loading the cap framework in the plugin. Thanks for the tip @pmuessig !
  • Add an index.cds file
    • This allows you to add entities, aspects or any other possible cds artifact to your plugin
  • Example what could be in the index.cds file:

 

Test the plugin

Before publishing the plugin you need to test this first. This can be done locally by following these steps:

  • Create tests folder in your plugin project

  • Create a simple CAP project in this test folder:

  • Add the plugin as a dependency to the CAP project using the local path, see below.
    • Run npm i after doing this.

  • Use the plugin in this local test project and run it

TypeScript CAP plugin:

You can choose to create a plugin in JS or TS. In case of TS, additional configuration is required:

Install the following devdependencies in the CAP plugin

 

npm i -D @types/node
npm i -D typescript

 

  • As for every TS project, use .ts for your files and write TypeScript.

Before making this available to npm, you have to build TS to JS. Therefore, you have to foresee a build command: “tsc” https://github.com/lemaiwo/cds-plugin-handlers/blob/39300bb3e6e154ba8eac6f709479325cf9cf7fb9/package.json#L8

To be able to run this, you also need a tsonfig file in your project:

https://github.com/lemaiwo/cds-plugin-handlers/blob/main/tsconfig.json

Publish

Once the plugin is ready you can make it available to the SAP Community by publishing this to npm.

Run “npm publish” locally or configure GitHub Actions to automatically publish a new version for every release:

  • In case of a TypeScript plugin: run tsc first 😉

Once published, you can simple use it as an npm dependency and start using it in your project.

Examples

It might help you to learn how to create a plugin and about the possibilities by looking in already created plugins. Some examples I made or still working on:

  • JavaScript example: https://github.com/lemaiwo/ui5-cap-serverside-rendering-plugin
  • TypeScript example: https://github.com/lemaiwo/cds-plugin-handlers/tree/main
  • Work in progress: https://github.com/spreadsheetimporter/cds-spreadsheetimporter-plugin

This can help you to learn about the possibilities. What helps me a lot are the examples of SAP: https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/plugins . Each plugin can be found on GitHub here: https://github.com/cap-js .

Also CAP plugins of other community members can help you. You can find them on npm and on best of CAP.

Conclusion

If you have anything that can be reused across CAP projects, turn it into a plugin and share it with the community on npm! Once it is on npm, add it to best of CAP: https://bestofcapjs.org/

entry.title: Re: SAC Data Action Advanced Formula - Copy Actual's valu...
entry.content: Data action execution is irrelevant to your table layout, and data action execution is always on the leaf nodes cross all dimensions. I would suggest you to check your table setting and filtering after having adding additional dimensions into table.

entry.title: 回复： Is is possible to assign different factory calendar f...
entry.content: Hello Fujita, You can assign the factory calendar to the plants in SSCUI 105877 - Define Plant. Best Regards Matt

entry.title: Re: Technical Guide to SAP DMO (Database Migration Option)
entry.content: Hi @mirja_kempin , Thanks you so much for the guide. Sure, will work on it.

entry.title: Re: Integrate ECC EHP 6.3 to IBP for order based planning
entry.content: First of all, SDI is not going to be sunset. At least not announced within SAP. In CIDS, flexible Planning area is possible for order based planing master data.

entry.title: Re: Exception during start of deployment for deploy type...
entry.content:
Hi,

It looks like the target node destination (pointing to where the import is targeted) is not created in the BTP account where cTMS is subscribed. See Creating Destinations Using SAP Cloud Deployment Service with Basic Authentication and Creating Destinations Using SAP Cloud Deployment Service with OAuth2Password Authentication.

Thanks,
Gauravi

entry.title: Re: How to read a SAP Note
entry.content: You need your company to give you access with an S-User. https://www.google.com/search?q=%22s-user%22%20site:sap.com

entry.title: Re: WBS Field need to be editable when User status is ZWCN.
entry.content: The project in cj20n is alredy released, but requirment is still i need to edit the WBS element number, so fo that there is an enhancement to allow us to edit even after release. I am not getting how to find that enhancement, so if there are enhancement, wherr and how to find them? Thanks and regards

entry.title: Re: WWI Report Template Sort Sequence
entry.content:
Hi Abdul,

 

I am not sure I really understood your requirement, bit I'd go like this:

 

BRG(SAP_EHS_1013_001)

BIF(G1013001VA(K) LK [key for phrase solid]

G1013001VA (linebreak)

EIF

BIF(G1013001VA(K) LK [key for phrase liquid]

G1013001VA (linebreak)

EIF

 

Best regards,

Ralph

entry.title: Enable of Park Post facility in SAP
entry.content:
We are enabling RPA in manual JV because in SAP in Tcode ZFB03 there is no facility of Park and post.
The benefit of RPA is that because of RPA there will be Park Post facility and for multiple line items approval a single approval will be send to approver and approver will approve it and get automatic posted in SAP. 
 
I am convincing my team to not to adopt RPA and instead of it enable the system of Park and Post in SAP only.
 
Kindly reply me is it possible to enable park post facility in ZFB03 as it will save our cost of RPA implementation.

entry.title: Crystal Report AR Invoice Service
entry.content:
I have my AR Invoice Item ready, and now I want to convert it to AR Invoice Service. After I try to convert it to service type, the description part and net amount is not showing, the section is not showing. How should I convert it? I'm very new to this. Assistance is very appreciated.

Thank you.

entry.title: SuccessFactors EC| Unable to update employee job info
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I recently hired an employee in SuccessFactors Employee Central. When I attempted to update his Line Manager, the system initially prevented me from making changes because the Work Schedule field was empty. Despite that, the system allowed me to skip filling in the Work Schedule during the hiring process.

After completing the Work Schedule field, I encountered the following error:
"The country of the time profile GMIM does not match the country/region for the selected company. Please choose a global time profile or one whose country/region matches the country/region for the selected company."

However, I didn’t select the mentioned time profile (GMIM); instead, I chose a global time profile.

Could you please advise on why this might be happening and how to resolve it?

Thank you!

entry.title: How to delete a master data items (created by students) in SAP s4 HANA fiori version
entry.content: I am teaching S4HANA course at Yanbu Industrial College. Every semester we have different students and when we assigned same IDs to the students they found an error data already exist. Example, we are using learn-001 to learn-200. The students created items like material, Accounts in FI and CO, Organizational structure in HCM. Next semester when different students use the same IDs they started getting this error. I want to know how I can delete these master data items if I have the MASTER login available.

entry.title: Hi, when creating PO, i want DP data entered in header fields be populated in all line items of PO.
entry.content:
Hi, When creating a purchase order, i want SAP to automatically substitutes/populate values in line items data from details entered in DP amount / percentage fields in the Header data of Purchase order.

 

Regards,

Uzair Ahmed

entry.title: Re: SAP Service Cloud - Version 2 - How to turn mandatory...
entry.content: Hi Syed,

entry.title: Is there any Predefined Integration Content for data replication between S4 HANA Cloud and S4 HANA?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 

I am now discovering a wide variety of predefined integration content that I can use in Integration Suite.

https://api.sap.com/discoverintegrations

I am wondering if there is any integration scenario between S4 HANA Cloud and S4 HANA? For example, data replication of cost center between the 2 systems.

I can not find any...(those which were shown on the list after choosing S4 HANA Cloud and S4 HANA do not seem like what I expect.)

Or the fact that there's none of them is because usually this kind of integration system will not require to use integration suite, but other sap products?

Thank you.
